return(function(O,J,e,C,r,n,N,w,B,a,x,S,j,u,i,z,U,E,F,H,o,I,W,X,L)i,U,B,E,u,F,L,X,a,W,z,o,w,I,x,H,j,S=function(O)for A=-443755-(-443756),#O,-579300-(-579301)do F[O[A]]=F[O[A]]+(334192+-334191)end if e C({},{[A(-232506+193403)]=x,[A(-997524+958120)]=O,[A(-1015585-(-976133))]=function()return-784147+-2883687 end})end end,function(O,A)local J=i(A)local e=function(e,C,r,n)return z(O,{e;C;r;n},A,J)end end,function(O)F[O]=F[O]-(-1025524-(-1025525))if F[O]==407013-407013 then F[O],W[O]=nil,nil end end,{},function(O,A)local J=i(A)local e=function(...)return z(O,{...},A,J)end return e end,function(O,A)local J=i(A)local e=function(e,C)return z(O,{e;C},A,J)end return e end,function(O,A)local J=i(A)local e=function(e,C,r,n,N,W,F,o,w)return z(O,{e;C,r,n,N;W,F;o,w},A,J)end return e end,{},function(z,e,C,r)local Lw={}local
